title: Confessions of a Vice Baron
director: S. Roy Luby, William A. O'Connor, Melville Shyer
writer: Marion Candler, Willis Kent, Harvey F. Thew
actors: Willy Castello, Lloyd Ingraham, Lona Andre
plot: On the eve of his execution, a vice-rackets bigshot recalls his various exploits in crimes such as abortion and white slavery, in which he frequently operated under an alias.
